default_neutral_definition: Everyday use in a neutral context.

default_safe_example.default: A person reacts in an everyday situation.
default_safe_example.noun: Several people calmly talk about the same thing.
default_safe_example.verb: A person acts quite deliberately in this situation.
default_safe_example.adj: In this situation, everything seems clearly that way.
default_safe_example.adv: In this situation, it happens exactly that way.
default_safe_example.chunk: In this situation, a person says exactly that.
